# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd
  ports:
    - name: http
      protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: authorization.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-auth
spec:
  sources:
    - serviceAccount: backend-sa
  destinations:
    - serviceAccount: frontend-sa
  rules:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        ports: [8080]
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        ports: [80]
